{{CargoOrgan
|name=Black Crystal Heart
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10856
|idx=61
|description=A pitch-black crystal that pulses eternally, as if unaware the body entombed in that sarcophagus has long since decayed.
|skill=
|hp=2108
|def=146
|atk=127
|rush=147
|gene1=Per purple or higher organ implanted, {race} HP +30
Purple or higher Organs implanted: 40/40
|gene2=Break RES +2%
|gene3=Restore 400 HP each round
|gene4=Fire DMG +60
|gene7=Fire DMG +3% (Awakened)
|}}
